site_meta_description: Paste screenshots or select images to extract text locally in the browser with OCR.
home_meta_description: Paste or select an image, preprocess it, inspect word boxes, and extract text directly in the browser with a client-side WASM OCR engine.
about_meta_description: About DA OCR and its private in-browser OCR workflow.
about_title: OCR that avoids the usual nonsense.
about_body: Dead-Ass OCR is built for the obvious use case: paste a screenshot, extract text, copy the result, and leave. The OCR engine runs in-browser through Tesseract.js, so images do not need to leave the device.
ocr_hero_body: No upload queue. No server round-trip. Paste a screenshot or pick an image, then run OCR directly in your browser with a WASM engine.
ocr_step_1_body: Hit Ctrl+V with an image in your clipboard.
ocr_step_2_body: Adjust preprocessing, language mix, and overlays before re-running OCR.
ocr_step_3_body: Copy the text and move on without leaving the page.
ocr_input_body: Choose the OCR preset, tune preprocessing, then re-run the current image when needed.
preprocess_body: Use grayscale, threshold, and contrast to help the OCR engine lock onto sharper text.
preprocess_threshold_hint: Threshold uses the grayscale image and pushes pixels to pure black or white.
crop_title: Run OCR on a selected region
crop_body: Enable crop mode, drag a rectangle on the raw preview, then re-run OCR on just that region.
crop_hint: The processed preview updates live while you adjust crop and preprocessing. OCR boxes refresh after the next OCR run.
overlay_body: Toggle OCR word boxes and click a detected word to highlight it on the image.
overlay_empty: Select a detected word to inspect its confidence and position.
dropzone_aria: Paste, drop, or choose an image for OCR
dropzone_body: The page listens for image paste globally, and this panel also accepts drag and drop.
raw_preview_body: This is the untouched source. Enable crop mode and drag directly on the image.
processed_preview_body: Threshold, grayscale, contrast, and crop are reflected here before you re-run OCR.
preview_pan_hint: Use wheel or buttons to zoom. Enable pan to drag the raw preview.
preview_status_ready: Ready to re-run with another image
status_initial: Paste an image anywhere on the page to start OCR.
status_processing_image: Processing image with the current controls
status_language_selected: {language} selected. Paste or choose an image to run OCR.
export_body: Download plain text, the full OCR result, or just the detected word-box coordinates.
output_running: Running OCR locally in your browser.
privacy_body: Images stay in the browser. OCR runs client-side with the selected language model.
best_results_body: Use sharp, high-contrast screenshots or scans and match the OCR preset to the document. Tiny text and heavy blur will reduce accuracy.
detected_words_body: Click a word chip to highlight its bounding box on the preview.
batch_body: Images run through the current OCR preset, preprocessing, and crop settings with a pooled worker queue.
batch_pending: Waiting to run or still processing.
only_image_error: Only image files can be processed.
clipboard_error: Clipboard access failed. Copy the extracted text manually.
